Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 891

TLPL671 Education Policy Analysis (3 Credits)

Policy making in education from planning to evaluation with emphasis on the identification of policy problems and the resources available

to analysts through multi-disciplinary approaches. An introductory experience with education policy analysis.

Credit Only Granted for. EDPS620 or TLPL671.
